body.body: See GitHub issue #330. Define JSON schema for habits (trigger + steps + loop_on). Migrate at least one existing habit. Acceptance: habit record loadable and executable without Python import.
body.title: T-habit-schema: Define habits as data, not code
body.result: T-habit-schema implemented: (1) tools/schema_runner.py — step-list executor with built-in prim_set/prim_branch/prim_goto + tool registry dispatch for any other primitive; ctx_init sets traversal context before step 1; MAX_STEPS=100 infinite-loop guard; (2) main.py: 'schema' habit_type wired in both execute_habit() and _process() dispatch, also added to fallthrough exclusion list; (3) seed_schema_habit.py seeded PROC_SCAN_DIR — 7-step dir scan with iteration loop (list→done→branch→iter→detect→goto→set). Smoke tested: 44-file scan confirmed, step trace visible, branch+loop correct.
